creator: lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk
text:
On Fri, Mar 21, 2014 at 05:52:42AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/sssd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/187789 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/187789
> 

Firstly, I was not able to reproduce it with 10.0-RELEASE
I didn't try 11.0-CURRENT

Secondly, your problem is with port security/krb5. This PR should be reasigned
to the security/krb5.

LS
